judge_reason: Both agree the page contains a newspaper clipping, but B adds detailed content (headlines, specific quoted text) that A omits without contradiction.
original_image_tags: A sheet of off-white paper with two hole-punches at the top. The page serves as a backing for a newspaper clipping.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned document page with a pasted newspaper clipping headed “‘Flying Saucers’ On Secret List,” handwritten notes, and a date stamp reading “45 APR 19 1949” with “NOT RECORDED”; no photograph or diagram is present.*
